/// Wire-format header for the custom binary protocol (v2).
///
/// Layout: `[version:1][flags:2][length:4]` — all big-endian.
pub struct PacketHeader {
    pub version: u8,
    pub flags: u16,
    pub length: u32,
}

impl PacketHeader {
    /// Serialize the header into a 7-byte buffer in network byte order.
    pub fn encode(&self, buf: &mut [u8]) {
        buf[0] = self.version;
        buf[1..3].copy_from_slice(&self.flags.to_be_bytes());
        buf[3..7].copy_from_slice(&self.length.to_be_bytes());
    }

    /// Deserialize a header from a 7-byte buffer.
    pub fn decode(buf: &[u8]) -> Self {
        Self {
            version: buf[0],
            flags: u16::from_be_bytes([buf[1], buf[2]]),
            length: u32::from_be_bytes([buf[3], buf[4], buf[5], buf[6]]),
        }
    }
}
